summary: 2 film announcements, 1 TV announcement across 5 trades.

film.title: Mr. Hero
film.announcement: Vietnam's Skyline Media has scheduled a North America and international rollout for the film.

film.title: The Chilean
film.announcement: Fandango Sales has picked up the film ahead of its Locarno premiere.

tv.title: The Beauty
tv.announcement: The cast of the FX series has been released, with the future of the series unclear.
